subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared is, verily, the One mentioned in the Books of God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر انه لهو المذکور فی کتب الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @station of the Manifestation of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @knowledge; recognition of God
